## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-transport/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-transport/issues/new?body=module:%20shipment_advice%0Aversion:%2014.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

documentation:
Check if a package level should be listed in the shipment advice.

Aim to be overridden by sub-modules.

documentation: Lock records for the current SQL transaction.

documentation: Validate transfers (create backorders for unprocessed lines)

documentation: Unplan moves that were not loaded and validated

documentation: Set incoming shipment advice to done when all planned moves are processed

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.wizards.unload_shipment.WizardUnloadShipment.action_unload
documentation: Unload the selected records from their related shipment.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.common.Common.load_records_in_shipment
documentation: Load pickings, move lines or package levels in the givent shipment.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.common.Common.unload_records_from_shipment
documentation: Unload pickings, move lines or package levels from the givent shipment.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_shipment_advice_incoming_done_full
documentation:
Validating an incoming shipment validates automatically planned
transfers. Here the planned transfers have been fully received.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_shipment_advice_incoming_done_partial
documentation:
Validating an incoming shipment validates automatically planned
transfers. Here the planned transfers have been partially received.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_shipment_advice_done_full
documentation:
Validating a shipment validate all fully loaded related transfers.

Whatever the backorder policy is, and if the loaded transfers are linked
to only one in progress shipment.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_shipment_advice_done_backorder_policy_disabled
documentation:
Validating a shipment with no backorder policy should let partial
transfers open.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_multi_shipment_advice_done_backorder_policy_disabled
documentation:
Load a transfer in multiple shipments and validate them with no BO policy.

The last shipment validated is then responsible of the the transfer validation.

1. Load first package in one shipment advice
2. Validate the first shipment advice: delivery order is not yet validated
3. Load second package in another shipment advice
4. Validate the second shipment advice: delivery order is now well validated

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_shipment_advice_done_backorder_policy_enabled
documentation:
Validating a shipment with the backorder policy enabled should
validate partial transfers and create a backorder.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shipment_advice.tests.test_shipment_advice.TestShipmentAdvice.test_assign_lines_to_multiple_shipment_advices
documentation:
Assign lines of a transfer to different shipment advices.

1. Load two packages in two different shipment advices
2. Validate the first shipment advice: delivery order is not yet validated
3. Validate the second shipment advice: delivery order is now well validated
